summary: Tested 4 specific bugs in Édu-Connect platform: GED Zone switching, Viability pie chart, Conversation user search, and Registration service selection. 3 out of 4 bugs are completely fixed.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 Not Found when accessing viability evaluations
critical_bugs.impact: Backend API missing but frontend displays default pie chart correctly

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 Not Found for registration step 1
critical_bugs.impact: Registration flow cannot complete step 1 to step 2 transition

working_endpoints.status: Working correctly - Zone Bleue/Verte switching functional
Working correctly - Returns 8 DG with hierarchical structure

integration_issues.issue: Form submission does not progress to service selection step

passed_tests: GED Zone Bleue/Zone Verte context switching interface
Viability page pie chart with 5 equal portions (Excellent, Bon, Moyen, Faible, Critique)
Conversation page user search functionality with 7 results
Services dropdown cascade API returning 8 Direction Générales
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix missing backend endpoints: 1) /api/dinacope/evaluations-viabilite (404) for viability data, 2) /api/auth/inscription/etape1 (404) for registration flow. Frontend UI is working correctly for all 4 bugs.
